title: Long SMP
description: Longsmp is a SMP meant to persist over time unlike most of my old SMP
body:
![Longsmp Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PpD5eGvV/images/eafe50568bb698c5f1d9124ba44bb053425a4009.png)

# Longsmp is a SMP meant to persist over time unlike most of my old SMP

## With 621 Mods! (463 Mods and 158 Libraries in mod menu)

### It features Adventure, Magic, Better Combat, Personalisation

A server is hosted by me with a proximity voice chat

The server is open to cracked version!

Some of the main mod are :

- Simple Voice Chat (Proximity Voice Chat)  

- Figura (Custom Avatars)

- ViveCraft (For VR Compatibility)

- AdventureZ (New Mobs/Boss)

- Terrestria, Traverse, Terralith, Geophilic, Better End, Better Nether (Generation Overhaul)

- MCA (Better villagers, Marry functions)

- Things/Trinkets (New Trinkets Items With Unique Effects)

- True Ending (Better Ender Dragon Boss Fight)

- Tom's Storage (Better Storage Options)

# Important !

If you want to join our SMP you will need to download this pack ! Feel free to delete/add any client sided mods (as long as it isn't cheats)

If you get any problems/errors, feel free to DM me on discord (enzomtp) or join the public discord !
